title: Adat Shiva Temple
tagline: Adat Shiva Temple — spiritual town of Kerala

overview.short: Adat Shiva Temple is located at Adat village in Thrissur district.
overview.description: Adat Shiva Temple is located at Adat village in Thrissur district. The temple has two main deities, Sri Parameswara and Maha Vishnu. Both deities having separate temple complexes. Lord Sri Parameswara facing east and Maha Vishnu is facing west.

routes.byAir: Fly to nearest airport + road transfer

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Puranattukara
topPlaces.description: Puranattukara is a census town in Thrissur district in the Indian state of Kerala.

topPlaces.name: Kadappuram
topPlaces.description: Kadappuram is a village in Thrissur district in the state of Kerala, India. Although in the Malayalam language, 'Kadappuram' may refer to any sea side beach usually with a fishing community, this article specifically refers to the area in Thrissur District where the village as well as the panchayat by the name of 'Kadappuram'.

topPlaces.name: Chittilappilly
topPlaces.description: Chittilappilly is a village in Thrissur district in the state of Kerala, India. It is a part of Adat Grama Panchayat, near its borders with Kaiparambu and Tholur Grama Panchayats.

topPlaces.name: Kendriya Vidyalaya, Puranattukara
topPlaces.description: Kendriya Vidyalaya, Puranattukara is a Kendriya Vidyalaya Sangathan school in Thrissur City under the Ministry of Human Resource Development, Government of India. Situated at the valley of the "Vilangankunnu", this institution is a pride to the Cultural Capital of Kerala.

topPlaces.name: Tholur
topPlaces.description: Tholur is a village in Thrissur district in the state of Kerala, India.

topPlaces.name: Vilangan Hills
topPlaces.description: Vilangan Hills (Malayalam: വിലങ്ങൻ കുന്ന്) is a hillock located in Adat Panchayat, near Thrissur city of Kerala state in India. The hill gives a panoramic view of Thrissur city and Thrissur-Ponnani Kole Wetlands from the top.

topPlaces.name: Amala Nagar
topPlaces.description: Amala Nagar is an Indian village in the Thrissur district of Kerala. It has Amala Institute of Medical Sciences, one of medical colleges of Thrissur district (And after which the place itself is named).

topPlaces.name: Muthuvara
topPlaces.description: Muthuvara is a village in the Thrissur district of Kerala, India.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Adat Shiva Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Adat Shiva Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Adat Shiva Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Cochin International Airport, Kochi (52 km) and the nearest railway station is Ernakulam Junction (Kochi) (66 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Adat Shiva Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Adat Shiva Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Adat Shiva Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Adat Shiva Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Adat Shiva Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Puranattukara, Kadappuram, Chittilappilly, Kendriya Vidyalaya, Puranattukara, Tholur.
